raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Legislature is working for comprehensive gun safety laws in response to a rise in gun violence.",
    "AB 1057 would allow for the seizure of ghost guns when an emergency Gun Violence Restraining Order (GVRO) is served.",
    "Ghost guns are handmade guns that can be created from unregulated parts and do not require a background check.",
    "The California Penal Code does not classify ghost guns as firearms, which currently prevents their seizure under GVROs.",
    "Ghost guns are increasingly showing up at crime scenes across the country due to their unregulated status.",
    "There has been a reported surge in gun sales, including ghost guns, since the onset of the pandemic.",
    "Businesses selling ghost gun kits are experiencing shipping delays due to exceptionally high demand.",
    "AB 1057 aims to prevent individuals deemed dangerous from possessing parts that can be easily converted into functional firearms.",
    "Gun Violence Restraining Orders (GVROs) have enjoyed broad bipartisan support in California.",
    "The failure to close loopholes in law allows dangerous individuals to possess ghost gun kits and parts that can be assembled into firearms.",
    "Proper use of gun violence restraining orders is seen as a powerful tool for preventing mass shootings and saving lives."
  ]
}
```
